top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley Cuts Oil Forecasts as Hormuz Deal Revives Supply
top_signals.summary: Morgan Stanley made substantial cuts to its oil-price forecasts for the coming quarters as the interim deal between the US and Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz stands to revive regional output and boost supplies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s Oil Refiners Slash Output After Crude Imports Plunge
top_signals.summary: Chinese oil refiners sharply reduced output last month to the weakest level in nearly four years, after the country’s crude imports plunged to an eight-year low due to the near-halt to shipments from the Persian Gulf.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Biocon's Mazumdar-Shaw Says Firm On Track To Be Top Insulin Maker
top_signals.summary: Biocon Executive Chairperson Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw says she is confident that the company's investment and capacity expansion in Insulin will make the company the top hub for the drug in the next five years. She speaks in an exclusive conversation with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX shares gain for second day after blockbuster debut
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s AI, satellite and rocket group climbs 19.6% further on Monday
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jardine to Buy Back $500 Million Shares, Boost Returns
top_signals.summary: Jardine Matheson Holdings Ltd. will buy back $500 million of its own shares by the end of next year as the Hong Kong company lays out targets for its transformation from a long-term owner-operator into an active investor more akin to a private equity fund.

top_signals.title: Chinese Bonds Draw Foreign Funds in May After a Year of Outflows
top_signals.summary: Foreign investors returned to Chinese sovereign bonds in May for the first time in over a year, drawn by the market’s resilience while a brutal selloff battered global debt.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock jumps 20% in first full day of trading after record debut
top_signals.summary: SpaceX is valued at over $2 trillion after its stock rallied on the first day of trading last week.

top_signals.title: Shohei Ohtani leads all players in early MLB All-Star Game voting
top_signals.summary: Ohtani, ‌31, is back to a full season ​of pitching and hitting for the first time since 2023 when he was a member of the Los Angeles Angels.
